quote: If you can't explain how the packet moves, how the relay clicks, or where the data is stored, you don't fully own the system yet.
bio: I build lean, production-ready software, background services, and embedded hardware integrations. Driven by a deep passion for IoT devices, microcontrollers (ESP32 / Arduino), and industrial control logic through a Siemens LOGO! PLC course — my goal is always maximum efficiency, zero unnecessary weight, and rock-solid system stability.

highlights.label: Location
highlights.text: Gordons Bay, Western Cape, South Africa.

highlights.label: Hardware & Systems
highlights.text: IoT / Microcontrollers (ESP32, Arduino), Siemens LOGO! PLC, Electrical Systems (N3/N4).

highlights.label: Core Stack
highlights.text: C# (.NET 9), JavaScript / Node.js, React, SQL (SQLite / SQL Server), Docker, Python.

highlights.label: Source Control / DevOps
highlights.text: GitHub & Azure DevOps — structured repositories, branches, and deployment workflows.

highlights.label: Open for
highlights.text: Collaborations on Open Source security tools, IoT projects, or DevOps automation.

contact.headline: That's a wrap!
contact.subheadline: You made it through the whole story — now let's talk.
contact.prompt: Contact me on one of these…
